nodes.label: Professional PDF formatter for resumes and cover letters.  Parses LLM markdown o
Make text safe for fpdf2 (latin-1 compatible).
Parse markdown resume text and render a professionally formatted PDF.
Parse markdown resume into named sections.
Check if a line is a section header (## Header or ALL CAPS HEADER).
Normalize section header to standard name.
Render a section header with a horizontal line underneath.
Render the professional summary as flowing paragraph text.
Render technical skills as 'Category: items' lines.
Render professional experience with job headers and bullet points.
Render projects with title line and bullet points.
Render education, certifications, awards as simple lines.
Render job title/company/location/dates line(s).      Handles common patterns:
Render a single bullet point with proper indent.
Render a line with **bold** markers mixed with regular text.
Split content into entries (jobs or projects) based on blank lines or ### header
Separate header lines from bullet points.
Render a cover letter with professional formatting.
Render a paragraph of body text.
